title: Cold Archive Retrieval
subtitle: Historical evidence retrieval takes minutes
objective: Design a hybrid retrieval path for cold blob data and hot metadata indexes.
constraints: Use correct storage per data type

concepts.title: Hybrid Storage
concepts.description: Combine blob storage for files and database for metadata.

concepts.title: Lookup Acceleration
concepts.description: Use cache for repeated metadata searches.

concepts.title: Client Access Layer
concepts.description: Requests should flow through API boundary.
